title: Core Characteristics of the Database Approach
description: A visual summary of the fundamental characteristics that differentiate the database approach from traditional file-based systems.
elements: Support of Multiple Views of Data
Sharing of Data and Multiuser Transaction Processing
relationships: The System Catalog enables Data Abstraction, which provides Program-Data Independence. This independence allows for the Support of Multiple Views, which is essential for the effective Sharing of Data and Multiuser Transaction Processing.
